title: Irony-Covered Hearts and Frenetic Hypercuriosity: The Multimedia Work of Yuri Umemoto
summary: Yuri Umemoto is a young composer born and raised in Tokyo, but mostly working in Europe. In his work he combines western classical music with influences of Japanese pop and internet culture. Writer Elia Brülhart and photographer Johanna Bommer met up with him in February this year, in his current residency studio. We’re on a hill between Leonberg, Gerlingen…
content: Irony-Covered Hearts and Frenetic Hypercuriosity: The Multimedia Work of Yuri Umemoto
